title: Omni-Man Totem
description: Turns the Totem of Undying into the Omni Man meme. From Invincible.
body:
Need a server for you and your friends? click the image below:

# Omni-Man Totem
Turns the Totem of Undying into one of the Omni-Man memes from Invincible. It changes the item itself as well as the sound that plays when used. Are you Sure?

This Pack was made because I was bored. So hope you enjoy it.
